headline: The Enclave at Bar W Ranch is Now Selling New Homes from the Mid-$400s
summary: LEANDER, TX / ACCESS Newswire / March 16, 2026 / D.R. Horton's Austin division is pleased to announce the official opening of The Enclave at Bar W Ranch. Thoughtfully set apart within the Bar W Ranch master planned community, The Enclave at Bar W ...
